userStories.title: Verify ticket navigation uses ref field (fix #25)
userStories.description: The handleOpenTicket function in apps/web/pages/[project]/index.vue already constructs ticket URLs using ticket.ref. The API now returns the ref field (fixed in PR #27). This story adds a unit test for handleOpenTicket asserting that router.push is called with the correct URL containing the ticket ref (e.g. NAX-1), not undefined or a numeric id. No source changes to index.vue are expected — confirm no other component uses ticket.id or ticket.number as a path segment.
acceptanceCriteria: When handleOpenTicket is called with a ticket where ref is 'NAX-1' and the project slug is 'nax', then router.push is called with '/nax/tickets/NAX-1'
When handleOpenTicket is called with a mock ticket, then router.push is NOT called with a URL containing 'undefined' as the path segment
Given a search across all files in apps/web/ for patterns constructing ticket URLs, no file uses ticket.id or ticket.number as the ticket path segment instead of ticket.ref

userStories.title: Add Label Management page (fix #24)
userStories.description: Create apps/web/pages/[project]/labels.vue following the exact pattern of apps/web/pages/[project]/agents.vue. The page must list labels fetched from GET /projects/:slug/labels in a Shadcn-nuxt Table with columns: Color (16x16 swatch span with background-color), Name, Actions. A Create Label form/section must have Name (required) and Color (optional, default #6366f1) fields that call POST /projects/:slug/labels on submit and refresh the list. Each row has a Delete button calling DELETE /projects/:slug/labels/:labelId. Success/error toasts shown for all mutations. Add i18n keys under labels.* to apps/web/i18n/locales/en.json and apps/web/i18n/locales/zh.json. Add a Labels nav link in apps/web/layouts/default.vue alongside the existing Agents/KB conditional links. Add unit tests in apps/web/tests/pages/labels.spec.ts covering list render, create, and delete flows.
acceptanceCriteria: When the labels page mounts with a project slug, then useAsyncData calls GET /projects/:slug/labels and renders one table row per label returned
When a label row is rendered, then a colored span with width 16px, height 16px, and background-color matching label.color is displayed in the Color column
When the Create Label form is submitted with a valid name and no color, then POST /projects/:slug/labels is called with the name and color defaulting to '#6366f1'
When POST /projects/:slug/labels succeeds, then the labels list is refreshed and a success toast with the key labels.toast.created is shown
When POST /projects/:slug/labels fails, then an error toast with the key labels.toast.createFailed is shown
When the Delete button for a label row is clicked, then DELETE /projects/:slug/labels/:labelId is called with the correct labelId
When DELETE /projects/:slug/labels/:labelId succeeds, then the labels list is refreshed and a success toast with the key labels.toast.deleted is shown
When the labels list is empty, then the empty state message corresponding to labels.empty i18n key is displayed
When apps/web/layouts/default.vue renders with a project route param, then a Labels navigation link pointing to /:project/labels is rendered alongside the Agents and KB links

analysis: Two web bugs targeted in this batch. US-007 (Bug #25): The handleOpenTicket function in apps/web/pages/[project]/index.vue already uses ticket.ref correctly (line 39-41: router.push(`/${slug}/tickets/${ticket.ref}`)). No source code change is needed — the bug was on the API side (PR #27 fixed TicketResponseDto to include ref). The web task is to write a unit test asserting router.push receives the correct URL with ref. Existing test file is at apps/web/tests/pages/project-board.spec.ts (and apps/web/tests/pages/index.spec.ts). The test must be added to apps/web/tests/pages/project-board.spec.ts or a new us-007 spec. US-008 (Bug #24): No label management page exists. apps/web/pages/[project]/labels.vue must be created following the exact pattern of apps/web/pages/[project]/agents.vue — useAsyncData, $api, toast, Shadcn-nuxt Table components. The sidebar in apps/web/layouts/default.vue has conditional project-scoped links (Agents, KB) that must be extended with a Labels link. i18n files live at apps/web/i18n/locales/en.json and apps/web/i18n/locales/zh.json (not apps/web/locales/ as stated in spec — confirmed by exploration). The labels page needs CRUD: list (GET /projects/:slug/labels), create (POST), delete (DELETE /projects/:slug/labels/:labelId). Inline edit is optional/skip. Color swatch is a 16x16 span with background-color. Test file should go in apps/web/tests/pages/labels.spec.ts. Key risks: i18n path mismatch (spec says apps/web/locales/ but actual path is apps/web/i18n/locales/), ensure correct path is used. The agents.vue page uses project-scoped API calls via useRoute().params.project as slug — labels.vue must follow the same pattern. Sidebar links are conditional on $route.params.project existing.
